parameters.text:
Analyze this receipt and return ONLY a raw JSON object (no markdown) with fields: 
- vendor
- date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- amount (number)
- currency: Return the 3-letter ISO code (e.g. 'USD', 'INR', 'EUR'). If unclear assume 'INR'.
- summary
- category: This MUST be exactly one of the following strings: 'Eating Out', 'Groceries', 'Utilities', 'Transport', 'Shopping', 'Subscriptions', 'Tech & Office', 'Medical', 'Miscellaneous'. If you are unsure, use 'Miscellaneous'.
